mapper.select: SELECT r.role_id, r.role_code, r.role_name, r.org_id, o.org_name, r.role_level, r.role_sts, r.last_chg_usr, r.last_chg_dt, u.user_name as last_chg_name FROM admin_sm_role r LEFT JOIN admin_sm_user u ON r.last_chg_usr = u.user_id LEFT JOIN admin_sm_org o ON o.org_id = r.org_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}

SELECT r.role_id, r.role_code, r.role_name, r.org_id, r.role_level, r.role_sts, r.last_chg_usr, r.last_chg_dt, o.org_name FROM admin_sm_role r LEFT JOIN admin_sm_org o ON r.org_id = o.org_id WHERE r.role_id = #{roleId}
select T1.ROLE_CODE as roleId ,T1.ROLE_NAME ,T1.ORG_ID from admin_sm_role T1 ${ew.customSqlSegment}

select r.ROLE_ID, r.ROLE_CODE, r.ROLE_NAME, r.ORG_ID, r.ROLE_LEVEL, r.ROLE_STS from admin_sm_role r right join admin_sm_user_role_rel ur on r.ROLE_ID = ur.ROLE_ID right join admin_sm_user u on ur.USER_ID = u.USER_ID where u.LOGIN_CODE = #{loginCode}

SELECT r.ROLE_ID,r.ROLE_CODE,r.ROLE_NAME,r.ROLE_LEVEL,r.ROLE_STS,r.LAST_CHG_USR,r.LAST_CHG_DT,r.ORG_ID,o.org_name FROM admin_sm_role r LEFT JOIN admin_sm_org o ON r.ORG_ID=o.ORG_ID ${ew.customSqlSegment}

SELECT r.role_id, r.role_code, r.role_name, r.org_id, o.org_name, r.role_level, r.role_sts, r.last_chg_usr, r.last_chg_dt FROM admin_sm_role r LEFT JOIN admin_sm_org o ON o.org_id = r.org_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}
